cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 事大交隣
cover.subtitle:
큰 명에는 사대,
이웃엔 교린의 외교.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Scene: a Joseon diplomatic mission — a row of envoys in deep crimson and dark blue official robes with black sa-mo caps, riding horses and carrying tribute boxes wrapped in silk, departing through a tall stone palace gate. A few servants carry banners on long poles (no text on banners). Mountains in the background. Composition: ceremonial procession, dignified motion. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + deep crimson + navy. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"4군은 최윤덕, 6진은 김종서"
장군과 지역을 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 사군(최윤덕, 압록강)과 육진(김종서, 두만강)을 구분해야 한다. 쓰시마 정벌은 1419년 이종무, 계해약조는 1443년 일본 세견선 50척·세사미두 200석 제한.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized Korean peninsula silhouette outline with four small dots along the upper-left border (4군) and six small dots along the upper-right border (6진), and a small ship icon at the lower-right suggesting trade with Japan. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ink-black outline + crimson #B45309 accent dots. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
